title: North America Clean Fuels Market Monthly Review: November 2025
content:
Key Highlights:

BC LCFS monthly trading volumes rose from 11.97K credits in September to 80.54K credits in October. In October, BC LCFS credit prices rose by 1.05% MoM. In October, OR CFP average credit prices increased by 1.34% compared to September. OR CFP trading activity witnessed a 112.00% rise in October. CA LCFS average monthly credit price fell by 1.38% month-over-month (MoM) in November. Monthly credit transactions fell by 74.61% MoM in November. Canada CFR bid and offer prices for both CC2 & CC3 rose MoM in November. Both average CC3 and CC2 offer price rose by 2.15%. CC2 and CC3 average bid prices stand at 367.50 CAD & average offer prices stand at 380.14 CAD in November. Average credit prices in WA CFS rose by 4.09% MoM in October. In October, 189.33K credits were traded with a total transaction value of $5.44M. RIN generation decreased by 2.27% MoM in October. 7.19B RINs were transacted in the month of September, recording nearly a 17.33% MoM rise.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
